name: togglelogic
description: Free-tier model routing for OpenClaw — sticky owner overrides, static routes, a deliberately-simple cheapest-default, and a structured audit stream. Optional cost visibility reports per-model dollar cost from dynamic public pricing (observe-only; curated free-tier providers; unpriced-loud, never a false $0.00). Bring your own provider credentials; no benchmark engine or model registry included. PATENT PENDING. An optional, separately-licensed ToggleLogic Intelligence layer adds benchmark-driven automatic selection.
author: Motherboard, Inc. (https://togglelogic.ai/)
